message.content: The page has a light blue background. In the top right corner, there is the Arabic text "وسال" in a teal color, with the English word "wesal" in a smaller, lighter teal font directly below it. To the right of this text, there is a blue heart-shaped icon with a white outline and a small white heart inside it. On the left side of the page, there is an illustration of a smartphone with a black border. The phone screen is a light gray color, and on the screen, there is a blue heart-shaped icon with a white outline and a small white heart inside it, matching the icon in the top right. The phone has a blue dot at the top left of the screen, representing a front camera, and a white line at the top center, representing a speaker. Below the phone, there is Arabic text in the same teal color as the other text on the page. The text is arranged in two lines: the first line reads "لا يوجد" and the second line reads "إلى الآن أي مستخدمين". The overall design is clean and minimalistic, with a focus on the brand name and the heart icon, which is a key element of the design.
